title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-powered mouse pointer that goes beyond basic cursor control by understanding what the pointer targets and its contextual significance. The tool reimagines a fundamental computer interface element that has remained largely unchanged for over fifty years.
